home.intro: Eagle Amsterdam is originally a men-only club and during regular hours that core identity remains. At the same time, we serve the wider LGBTQI+ community with a diverse program of inclusive fetish events.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.daytimeNote: For daytime parties and special events, please consult the agenda.
contact.mailingListDesc: Subscribe to our mailing list to stay updated only 4 times a year.
contact.subscribedDesc: You've been added to our mailing list.
contact.invalidEmailDesc: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.groupChatsDesc: Stay connected with the Eagle Amsterdam community.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.question: Question
contact.questionPlaceholder: Type your question or message here...
contact.messageSentDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.loginPrompt: Log in as a VIP member to see your profile information.
settings.name: Name
settings.blockedHelp: Notifications were blocked. To enable them, open your browser or device settings and allow notifications for this app.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language used throughout the app.

vipLogin.title: VIP MEMBERS
vipLogin.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a verification code via email.
vipLogin.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
vipLogin.sendError: Could not send code. Please try again.

vipVerify.title: VERIFY CODE
vipVerify.sentTo: We sent a code to <0>{{email}}</0>. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
vipVerify.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
vipVerify.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

loyalty.title: LOYALTY
loyalty.infoText: To collect tokens, scan the QR at the bar during the event. When reaching the 6 tokens, a free-voucher will be placed automatically in the Member Deals area. This voucher gives you free access to the Naked Party, Horsemen & Knights or Cum Hunks.

pwa.mobileOnlyDesc: Please visit this link on your mobile device to install the Eagle VIP app.
pwa.installDesc: To access the full app experience, add it to your home screen.
pwa.step1DescIos: Look for the icon at the bottom of Safari. Sometimes the share button is hidden under the 3 dots
pwa.step1DescAndroid: Look for the icon in your browser. Sometimes the share button is hidden under the 3 dots
pwa.step2DescIos: Scroll down in the menu and tap it
pwa.step2TitleAndroid: Select "Install app" or "Add to Home screen"
pwa.step2DescAndroid: Tap the option in the menu
pwa.step3Title: Open the app from your phone
pwa.step3Desc: Tap the Eagle icon on your home screen to launch the app

vipSetPassword.title: SYSTEM UPGRADE
vipSetPassword.message: We've upgraded to a faster, more secure system! For your safety, passwords couldn't be carried over — please set a new one to continue.
vipSetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
vipSetPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
